prompts.name: 90年代抓拍派对照片 | 年轻男子大笑，红眼效果
prompts.content: 1998年用一次性相机拍摄的闪光灯快照。一个男子在混乱的家庭派对中。红眼效果、强烈的阴影、动态模糊和胶片颗粒。构图略微倾斜且杂乱。
prompts.author: Amira Zairi
prompts.nameEn: Candid 90s Party Photo | Young Man Laughing, Red-Eye
prompts.contentEn: A flash photography snapshot taken on a disposable camera in 1998. A man at a chaotic house party. Red-eye effect, harsh shadows, motion blur, and film grain. The composition is slightly tilted and messy.

prompts.name: 浪漫喜剧海报：如何在十天里甩掉一个男生
prompts.content:
{
  "scene_summary": "干净的风格，2000年代初浪漫喜剧工作室海报合成。两个成年人背对背站立，姿态俏皮自信，都侧目相视，带着愉悦的表情。",
  "composition": "女性在左侧，双臂交叉，优雅的姿态。男性在右侧，手插口袋，放松的倾斜。全身可见，留有充足的标题负空间。",
  "wardrobe": "女性：无袖/抹胸缎面金黄色及地长裙，光泽平滑，简约首饰。男性：深炭色或黑色定制西装，白衬衫，无领带或低调领带。",
  "props": "无。",
  "background": "温暖淡黄/奶油色天空渐变，底部有极其微妙的城市/公园模糊；干净的工作室剪影感。",
  "lighting": "高调工作室灯光配柔光箱主光+柔和轮廓光；边缘清晰，自然的阴影。",
  "typography": {
    "title_text_exact": "HOW TO LOSE A GUY IN 10 DAYS",
    "font_vibe": "经典浪漫喜剧衬线字体，精致的间距",
    "color_and_harmony": "主色调黑色配优雅的红/绿色点缀，与温暖背景协调不冲突",
    "placement": "中下方，像经典浪漫喜剧海报一样堆叠排列"
  }
}
prompts.author: Özge
prompts.nameEn: Romantic Comedy Poster: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
prompts.contentEn:
{
  "scene_summary": "Clean early-2000s rom-com studio poster composite. Two adults stand back-to-back in a playful confident stance, both glancing sideways at each other with amused expressions.",
  "composition": "Woman on the left, arms crossed, elegant posture. Man on the right, hands in pockets, relaxed lean. Full-body visible with generous negative space for title.",
  "wardrobe": "Woman: sleeveless/strapless satin yellow-gold floor-length gown with smooth sheen, minimal jewelry. Man: dark charcoal or black tailored suit, white shirt, no tie or subtle tie.",
  "props": "None.",
  "background": "Warm pale yellow/cream sky gradient with extremely subtle city/park blur at the bottom; clean studio cutout feel.",
  "lighting": "High-key studio lighting with softbox key + gentle rim light; crisp edges, natural shadows.",

    "title_text_exact": "HOW TO LOSE A GUY IN 10 DAYS",
    "font_vibe": "classic rom-com serif with refined spacing",
    "color_and_harmony": "primary black with tasteful red/green accents that match the warm background without clashing",

}

prompts.name: 雨中浪漫情侣电影海报 - 恋恋笔记本
prompts.content:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "text_to_image_photoreal_movie_poster_notebook_style_title_only",
      "version": "v1.0",
      "priority": "high"
    },
    "references": {
      "reference_images": {
        "female_reference": "UPLOAD_FEMALE_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)",
        "male_reference": "UPLOAD_MALE_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)",
        "layout_reference": "UPLOAD_THIS_NOTEBOOK_POSTER_AS_LAYOUT_REFERENCE (RECOMMENDED)"
      },
      "reference_rules": {
        "exactly_two_references_only": true,
        "preserve_identity_female": true,
        "preserve_identity_male": true,
        "identity_lock_strength_female": 0.995,
        "identity_lock_strength_male": 0.995,
        "face_similarity_priority": "MAX",
        "preserve_facial_proportions": true,
        "preserve_eye_shape_nose_lips_jawline": true,
        "no_beautify_no_face_morph": true,
        "keep_age_and_gender_consistent": true,
        "no_identity_blending": true
      }
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "2:3",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "photoreal_cinematic_romance_poster_rainy_drama",
      "sharpness": "high",
      "film_grain": "subtle",
      "dynamic_range": "high",
      "print_ready": true
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "创作一张受雨中戏剧性拥抱启发的照片级真实电影海报。仅限两人（一女一男）。面部必须完全匹配上传的参考图片（最大身份保真）。近距离情感姿势，情侣在雨中紧紧拥抱。大雨倾盆，湿透的衣物，真实的皮肤质感，强烈的浪漫情感。柔和的阴天自然光配电影级对比度，海报级真实感。",
      "composition": {
        "framing": "中近景到特写，上半身为主体",
        "pose": "雨中亲密拥抱，面庞贴近，情感浓烈",
        "environment": "户外暴雨，模糊的自然背景，无可见建筑",
        "weather": "大雨伴有可见的水滴和雨丝",
        "title_area": "底部中央预留标题位置"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_styling": {
        "female_outfit": "简约短袖或盖袖连衣裙，被雨水浸透，天然面料",
        "male_outfit": "浅色衬衫被雨水浸透，袖子自然垂下",
        "hair_and_makeup": "湿发丝，自然妆容，无华丽造型",
        "skin": "真实的湿润皮肤质感，可见毛孔，无平滑处理"
      },
      "lighting_and_color": {
        "lighting": "柔和自然的阴天光线，雨中有微妙的高光",
        "color_palette": "冷蓝色和柔和的中性色，浪漫的柔和色调",
        "avoid_cgi": "严格照片级真实，仅电影级光学效果"
      },
      "typography_and_text": {
        "title_text_exact": "THE NOTEBOOK",
        "text_style": "优雅经典衬线体，浪漫剧情片感觉，完全可读",
        "placement": {
          "title": "底部中央"
        },
        "strict_spelling_rule": "完全按照提供的标题渲染。其他任何位置不得出现文字。"
      },
      "strict_rules": [
        "仅限两人",
        "仅使用上传的女性和男性参考图片的面部（最大相似度，无偏移）",
        "仅允许一个文本元素：'THE NOTEBOOK'",
        "无标语、无演员名字、无演职员表、无工作室标志、无水印",
        "照片级真实电影浪漫海报风格"
      ]
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "多余的人物",
      "多余的面部",
      "身份偏移",
      "面部融合",
      "换脸痕迹",
      "美颜滤镜",
      "塑料皮肤",
      "卡通",
      "动漫",
      "CGI效果",
      "模糊的面部",
      "畸形的手",
      "多余的手指",
      "多余的文本",
      "演员名字",
      "标语",
      "演职员表",
      "水印",
      "标志"
    ]
  }
}

prompts.name: 少年骇客电影海报：照片级真实与动画双人组合
prompts.content:
超高清分辨率8K工作室肖像，展示一位真实人类女性站在自选的卡通角色旁边，
全身构图，两个主体清晰可见且居中。

人类主体：年轻成年女性，自然微笑，放松自信的姿态，真实的面部特征，自然妆容，
穿着现代休闲服装，如针织毛衣、合身牛仔裤或裤子、休闲运动鞋，双手放松或自然摆姿势，
照片级真实的皮肤质感，细腻的发丝，柔和的面部高光。

卡通角色：[INSERT CARTOON CHARACTER NAME OR STYLE]，完全动画化和风格化，鲜艳饱和的色彩，平滑或毛绒般的表面质感，
富有表现力的大眼睛，友好自信的表情，夸张的卡通比例，以类似人类的姿势直立站立，
与人类主体自然互动，站立靠近或轻微倾斜。

灯光：柔和专业工作室灯光，均匀照明，无强烈阴影，微妙的轮廓光将主体与背景分离。

背景：干净简约的工作室背景，纯色或平滑渐变，颜色与主体协调，无道具，无文字。

风格与品质：超精细，照片级真实人物+高质量3D卡通渲染，超锐利对焦，电影级清晰度，
商业广告外观，高级质感，无水印，无标志，无文字，完美平衡的真实感与动画感。
prompts.author: ShaHid WaNii
prompts.nameEn: Ben 10 Cinematic Poster: Photorealistic & Animated Duo
prompts.contentEn:
Ultra-high-resolution 8K studio portrait featuring a real human woman standing beside a stylized cartoon character of choice, 
full-body composition, both subjects clearly visible and centered.

Human subject: young adult woman with natural smile, relaxed confident posture, realistic facial features, natural makeup, 
wearing modern casual clothing such as a knit sweater, fitted jeans or pants, and casual sneakers, hands relaxed or casually posed, 
photorealistic skin texture, detailed hair strands, soft facial highlights.

Cartoon character: [INSERT CARTOON CHARACTER NAME OR STYLE], fully animated and stylized, vibrant saturated colors, smooth or plush-like surface texture, 
expressive large eyes, friendly confident expression, exaggerated cartoon proportions, standing upright in a human-like pose, 
interacting naturally with the human subject by standing close or leaning slightly.

Lighting: soft professional studio lighting, even illumination, no harsh shadows, subtle rim light separating subjects from background.

Background: clean minimal studio backdrop, solid color or smooth gradient, color-coordinated with subjects, no props, no text.

Style & Quality: hyper-detailed, photorealistic human + high-quality 3D cartoon render, ultra-sharp focus, cinematic clarity, 
commercial advertising look, premium finish, no watermark, no logos, no text, perfectly balanced realism and animation.

prompts.name: 巨型铅笔城市景观：超现实都市建筑
prompts.content: 将[EVERYDAY OBJECT]变为一座巨大的现实世界纪念碑。表面材质物理准确，有可见的磨损、划痕、灰尘，以及像人和车辆这样的比例参照。从低角度电影级视角拍摄，真实的日光，超精细的纹理。
prompts.author: Aleena Amir
prompts.nameEn: Giant Pencil Cityscape: Surreal Urban Construction
prompts.contentEn: Transform [EVERYDAY OBJECT] into a massive real-world monument. Surface materials are physically accurate, with visible wear, scratches, dust, and scale references like people and vehicles. Shot from a low-angle cinematic perspective, realistic daylight, ultra-detailed textures.

prompts.name: 雨中心碎：离别的电影级剧情
prompts.content: 创建一个9格电影级故事板，设定在阴雨绵绵、忧郁的氛围中。展示一位穿着湿透连衣裙的年轻女子站在石拱门下，一个男人走入雨中远去。包括她情感表达的特写、两人手分开的瞬间、她靠在柱子上哭泣的镜头，以及最后一个她独自站立的全景。使用柔和、忧郁的灯光，蓝灰色调，浅景深，和戏剧性的雨滴。画面应该富有情感、诗意和电影感。
prompts.author: Oogie
prompts.nameEn: Heartbreak in the Rain: Cinematic Drama of Separation
prompts.contentEn: Create a 9-panel cinematic storyboard set in a rainy, melancholic atmosphere. Show a young woman in a soaked dress standing beneath stone arches as a man walks away into the rain. Include close-ups of her emotional expression, a moment of their hands parting, shots of her crying against a pillar, and a final wide shot of her standing alone. Use soft, moody lighting, blue-gray tones, shallow depth of field, and dramatic raindrops. Panels should feel emotional, poetic, and film-like
